gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/185)
text: إِنَّ الشَّكَّ وَ الْمَعْصِيَةَ فِي النَّارِ لَيْسَا مِنَّا وَ لَا إِلَيْنَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, from Bakr Bin Muhammad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The doubter and the disobedient one would be in the Fire. He is neither from us<sup>asws</sup> nor to us<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Ishaq from Bakr ibn Muhammad from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Doubts and disobedience are in the fire. It (doubt or people having doubts) is not from us nor is it directed to us.’”
